case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. TIFFANY SMITH et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 120 MIDDLE POINT ROAD, S.F. CA. 94124, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY DOES 1 TO 10 INCUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JUN-07-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY
RENT DEPOSIT TRUST RECEIPT NO. 18753 DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $2.73 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $19.11 FOR TRANSACTION W2107724R016 (RENT DEPOSIT), PAYABLE TO SFHA, DOC #1900786104, TRUST TAG #18753, WARRANT #38001101, DATED OCT-09-2007
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, TIFFANY
